creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 152710
Makefile with CPE information added

shells/fish has was updated due to vulnerabilities with a CVE number (e.g. CVE-2014-2905)[0]. This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[1].

[0] http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/6c083cf8-4830-11e4-ae2c-c80aa9043978.html
[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
